ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Plum, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Duck (74%), Plum Sauce (26%) (Concentrated Plum Juice, Sugar, Concentrated Orange Juice, Concentrated Redcurrant Juice, Chicken Stock (Water, Chicken Bones, Yeast Extract, Salt, Cornflour, Ground White Pepper, Ground Fennel Seeds, Parsley, Bay Leaves, Carrots, Leeks, Onions, Garlic), Cornflour, Red Wine Vinegar, Concentrated Lemon Juice, Ground Cinnamon, Ground Cloves)
product_name: Collection British Duck Breasts with plum sauce
